property.name: formId
property.label: Form
property.description: Active (published) form to render. The active published version is used.

property.name: formId
property.label: Form
property.description: Active (published) form to render. A ?formId= URL parameter overrides this.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id (optional)
property.description: Optional record Id for prefill/edit context. A ?recordId= URL parameter overrides this.

property.name: versionId
property.label: Version Id (optional)
property.description: Render a specific version instead of the active published one.

property.name: formId
property.label: Form Id
property.description: Id of the Form (Form__c) to render.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Optional record Id for prefill/edit context.
